data.title: Study of the Profile and Clinical Management of Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis Treated With Biologic Therapy Alone
data.brief_summary: This observational multicenter study will evaluate the management of disease and safety in clinical practice in patients with moderate to severe rheumatoid arthritis receiving any biological therapies in monotherapy.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Adult patients, \>/=18 years of age
* Patients with moderate to severe rheumatoid arthritis who have had an inadequate response or intolerance to disease modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs) or other biological drugs
* Patients treated with biologic DMARDs alone for at least
endpoints: Number of Participants With Level of Education Completed
Number of Participants With Smoking Habits
Smoking-habit for Smokers or Ex-smokers (Packs in Years)
